evals.prompt: Run these five questions against our Fini bot, adjust one guideline to fix the failures, and retest them.
evals.expected_output: A baseline-test, classify, minimal prompt diff, approval, full-array update, re-fetch, and same-case retest workflow.
assertions: Fetches the complete current prompt before editing
Classifies failures before deciding the prompt is responsible
Preserves all three prompt arrays in the write
Requires approval for the prompt update
Re-fetches the saved version and reruns the same questions

evals.prompt: Create an escalation rule from these instructions, but do not make it live yet.
evals.expected_output: Uses a rule draft, inspects the resulting flow, and leaves bot assignment and publishing for later approval.
assertions: Uses the rule-draft workflow rather than creating a published rule
Does not assume draft botIds imply live assignment
Reports the review and publish steps still required

evals.prompt: Import these Zendesk articles into our knowledge base.
evals.expected_output: Routes to sources and knowledge workflows rather than treating ingestion as agent prompt configuration.
assertions: Does not use prompt, rule, or tag updates for a source-ingestion request
